news.t: F/m Investments Announces Listing Exchange Change for US Credit Series ETFs to Nasdaq
China-focused ETFs struggle amid fears of another regulatory ‘crackdown'
F/m Investments Launches US Credit Series ETFs

overview.description: The F/M 3-Year Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF (ZTRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of equally weighted US investment grade corporate bonds with remaining term maturities of approximately three years. ZTRE was launched on Jan 10, 2024 and is issued by F/m Investments.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Liquid Corporate 3 Year Maturity Index

data.title: China-focused ETFs struggle amid fears of another regulatory ‘crackdown'
data.text: Hi! This week's ETF Wrap funds looks at China-focused funds that are struggling in 2024, with Clocktower's chief strategist Marko Papic providing his take on concerns tied to the country.
